<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see http://redis.io/commands/zpopmin */ class ZPOPMIN extends RedisCommand { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getId() { return 'ZPOPMIN'; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function parseResponse($data) { $result = []; for ($i = 0; $i < count($data); ++$i) { if (is_array($data[$i])) { $result[$data[$i][0]] = $data[$i][1]; // Relay } else { $result[$data[$i]] = $data[++$i]; } } return $result; } }
